_: 🎮 Controller registry — which games get the F310 mapped, and how we detect them. The daemon reads this: it syncs every profile listed here from the repo, watches for a matching process, and starts antimicrox with that game's profile (restarting the mapper when the child switches games). ADDING A GAME = commit its .amgp profile + add an entry here. No daemon edits needed.
_detect: proc = regex on the process name; cmdline = optional regex the command line must ALSO match (empty = any). First match wins, top to bottom — put the most specific entries first.
